hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: This exercise would be a lot easier if you had some common functions available like a length function and a startsWith function

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: A good outline would be: Go through each name on the list, if the name starts with the person's first name, return true. If none of the names match, return false

hints.question: Hint
hints.answer: You need to check if the name starts with the first name followed by a space, OR if the name equals the first name exactly (for single-name celebrities like Cher)
